discrepancies.title: Synth verdict explains the 3-vs-2 sorry count as iter-13 transient
discrepancies.detail: Q-195-1 verdict diagnoses the slot 144 '3' as a mid-iter-13 snapshot vs slot 141C's '2' as iter-13 fixed-point. Canonical reporting = fixed-point count. This resolves D-143-1 with Resolution 2 (iter-13-transient) selected as canonical interpretation. No data contradiction; both '3' and '2' were correct at their respective observation times under different reporting semantics.
discrepancies.resolution: Codify Resolution 2 as SIARC canonical sorry-count convention via store_memory + close d-143-1-sorry-count-canonical todo. D-141C-1 resolves identically by transitivity.
